name: Orange Cream Mascarpone
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the egg yolks and sugar until thick and pale.
2. Add the mascarpone cheese and beat until completely mixed in.
3. Stir in two tablespoons of liqueur until well combined.
4. Refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours.
5. Toss the orange slices in the remaining liqueur.
6. Spoon the mascarpone into stemmed dessert glasses.
7. Top with orange slices before serving.
